query:
-- Find Fast Cut customer
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount, unmatchedBillingCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Fast Cut%' OR xeroContactName LIKE '%Fast Cut%';

-- Find all services for Fast Cut
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.phoneNumber, s.connectionId
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerName LIKE '%Fast Cut%' OR s.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Fast Cut%' OR xeroContactName LIKE '%Fast Cut%'
);

-- Find billing items for Fast Cut
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.matchStatus,
       bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.category
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Fast Cut%';
